Key themes include MA compliance, AI and innovation, operational excellence, policy updates, and member experience. All-inclusive ticket includes sessions, workshops, receptions, meals, and exhibit hall access.

results.name: Southern California State of Reform Health Policy Conference 2026
results.short_description: The Southern California State of Reform Health Policy Conference brings together healthcare executives, policymakers, and thought leaders to discuss the most pressing issues in California health policy.
results.long_description: The Southern California State of Reform Health Policy Conference brings together practitioners, thought leaders, and policymakers. Topics include federal health policy changes, CalAIM and its future, housing and homelessness response, dual eligibility and elder care, AI and technology innovation, youth and family health, immigration and healthcare access, and behavioral health.

results.name: ACHP Annual Symposium & Board Meeting
results.short_description: ACHP's premier event bringing together board members, C-suite executives, and healthcare leaders to discuss differentiation strategies and federal policies.
results.long_description: The ACHP Annual Symposium brings together the full C-suite and Board of Trustees from Alliance of Community Health Plans member organizations. ACHP represents the unique payer-provider partnership model in health care, with 30 nonprofit, local health plans serving more than 22 million people across the US. The Symposium focuses on care innovation, affordability, quality and patient experience.

attendance_pricing.notes: Member event - contact ACHP for registration. Sponsorship opportunities available starting at $30,000

results.name: Becker's 11th Annual Health IT + Digital Health + RCM Meeting
results.short_description: Annual conference on the future of business and clinical technologies in healthcare.
results.long_description: The 11th Annual Health IT + Digital Health + RCM Meeting brings together healthcare technology leaders to discuss the future of business and clinical technologies.

results.name: OAHP Annual Convention & Trade Show
results.short_description: Annual convention and trade show for Ohio health plan professionals. Two-day event featuring industry insights and networking.
results.long_description: The OAHP Annual Convention & Trade Show is the premier event for health plan professionals in Ohio, bringing together managed care executives, policymakers, and industry stakeholders. The two-day event features educational sessions, networking opportunities, and a trade show showcasing the latest healthcare solutions and services. OAHP advocates for quality, affordable healthcare coverage for Ohioans.

attendance_pricing.notes: Registration via OAHP member portal. Contact info@oahp.org for pricing details.

keynote_speakers: Ohio health plan executives

results.name: RISE Member Engagement & Experience Symposium
results.location_venue: Crowne Plaza New Orleans French Quarter - Astor
results.short_description: Your front-row seat to what's next in member outreach, satisfaction, and loyalty. Where great engagement becomes a competitive edge.
results.long_description: The RISE Member Engagement & Experience Symposium is your front-row seat to what's next in member outreach, satisfaction, and loyalty. With CMS regulations evolving and the spotlight on member satisfaction, this symposium helps health plans rethink how they connect with members, especially those hardest to reach. Topics include CMS Final Rule insights, behavioral science and AI strategies for onboarding and retention, equity in care, aligning engagement with quality and risk adjustment, and structured networking with facilitated roundtables.

attendance_pricing.notes: Early bird ends July 17. Includes all sessions, meals, networking events, exhibit hall

keynote_speakers: Senior leaders from health plans
CBO executives

results.long_description: The Pennsylvania State of Reform Health Policy Conference brings together practitioners, thought leaders, and policy makers working to improve healthcare. Topics include federal healthcare policy impacts on Pennsylvania, Medicaid and CHIP, behavioral health and substance use disorder, maternal and child healthcare, and value-based care initiatives.

results.name: Civitas Networks for Health Annual Conference 2026
results.short_description: National convening for health data sharing and multi-sector collaboration leaders advancing health information exchange.
results.long_description: Civitas Annual Conference brings together hundreds of passionate industry leaders, decision-makers, and innovators to discuss interoperability, data-driven quality improvement, social determinants of health, public health, and health outcomes.

results.name: Behavioral Health Tech Conference 2026
results.location_venue: Gaylord Opryland Resort and Convention Center
results.short_description: The largest convening focused on expanding access to mental health, substance use, and autism/IDD through technology, health equity and innovation.
results.long_description: The Behavioral Health Tech Conference brings together passionate individuals committed to making behavioral health more accessible and impactful. Designed for providers, innovators, and advocates who believe in the power of technology and collaboration to drive real change. Features interactive workshops with Medicaid experts, curated networking events, immersive expo hall experiences, and 300+ speakers across 45+ hours of sessions.

tiers.hosted_vip: Complimentary for qualifying senior decision-makers; includes up to $750 travel reimbursement

keynote_speakers: Jodie Sweetin
Leigh Steinberg
Alyson Stoner

results.name: AHIP State Issues Retreat 2026
results.short_description: AHIP's member-only retreat on state-level health policy and regulatory issues.
results.long_description: The AHIP State Issues Retreat brings together health plan leaders and state trade association executives to address state-level health policy, regulatory developments, and advocacy strategy. Attendance is limited to AHIP member health plans, AHIP retained counsel, and state trade association executives.

results.name: Wisconsin Association of Health Plans Annual Meeting
results.short_description: Wisconsin Association of Health Plans annual meeting. WAHP represents 15 community-based health plans providing coverage in every county of Wisconsin.
results.long_description: The WAHP Annual Meeting brings together Wisconsin health plan professionals for two days of networking and programming. Thursday features choice of a round of golf at a premier Wisconsin course or an Oktoberfest themed outing, followed by an evening reception at an iconic Milwaukee venue with cuisine, live entertainment, and networking. Friday focuses on insightful programming with expert speakers, engaging panel discussions, and key industry updates addressing pressing topics in health care.

results.name: NASHP Annual Conference 2026
results.host_org: National Academy for State Health Policy
results.short_description: NASHP 39th Annual Conference for state health policy leaders.
results.long_description: NASHP's 39th Annual Conference brings together hundreds of state leaders from all 50 states and Washington, DC to bring attention to the most timely, cutting-edge issues facing state health policymakers and highlight innovative solutions. Topics include Medicaid, public health, health care costs, coverage and access, behavioral health, workforce, maternal and child health, primary care, caregiving, aging, and more.

results.name: MHPA 2026 Annual Conference
results.short_description: The LARGEST Medicaid Managed Care Annual Conference presented by the nation's LEADING trade association EXCLUSIVELY dedicated to Medicaid.
results.long_description: The largest Medicaid Managed Care Annual Conference, hosted by Medicaid Health Plans of America (MHPA). Features 4 educational tracks: Access to Care, Complex Care, Hot Topics, and Policy. Brings together Medicaid health plan leaders, policymakers, and industry stakeholders.

attendance_pricing.notes: Includes all sessions, exhibit hall, 2 breakfasts, 2 lunches, refreshment breaks, and receptions

keynote_speakers: State Medicaid Directors
CMS leaders
Health plan executives

results.name: Minnesota State of Reform Health Policy Conference 2026
results.short_description: Healthcare policy conference for executives and policymakers covering behavioral health, tribal health, and housing-healthcare integration.
results.long_description: The Minnesota State of Reform Health Policy Conference pulls together practitioners, thought leaders, and policymakers – each working to improve the healthcare system in their own way – into a unified conversation. Topics include healthcare delivery in 2026, behavioral health amid federal shifts, housing and healthcare integration, youth health and justice, public health infrastructure, equitable healthcare, Native and Tribal health, and primary/behavioral health integration. Features keynote sessions with hospital CEOs and health insurer executives.

results.name: Attest HEDIS Client Conference 2026
results.short_description: Annual client conference covering HEDIS specification changes, quality measurement best practices, data validation, and audit preparation for health plan quality professionals.
results.long_description: Attest HEDIS® Client Conference guides attendees through critical elements needed for successful reporting with special attention to new measures, changes in HEDIS® specifications, and best practices. Topics include MY2026/MY2026 specification changes, CAHPS reporting, Medicare reporting, data quality assurance, audit panels, data mapping, FHIR fundamentals, and supplemental data strategies. In-person only event over two full days.

results.name: NCQA Health Innovation Summit 2026
results.short_description: Summit exploring quality measurement, HEDIS, accreditation, and healthcare quality innovation.
results.long_description: The NCQA Health Innovation Summit brings together healthcare leaders to explore quality measurement, health plan accreditation, HEDIS measures, and innovations in healthcare quality improvement. NCQA sets the standard for healthcare quality assessment.

results.name: HMA Conference 2026
results.short_description: Health Management Associates annual conference on Medicare, Medicaid, and Marketplace policy and strategy for healthcare leaders.
results.long_description: At HMA's annual conference you will join with industry leaders to discuss new directions in payment and financing of publicly funded healthcare programs, community-level strategies for special populations, digital health policies, and innovations to strengthen access to behavioral health services.

results.name: NAACOS Fall 2026 Conference
results.short_description: National Association of ACOs fall gathering for accountable care organization leaders on value-based care and policy updates.
results.long_description: The NAACOS Fall Conference brings together ACO leaders, healthcare executives, and policy experts to discuss the latest developments in accountable care, value-based payment models, and Medicare policy. Attendees will gain insights into regulatory updates, best practices for ACO success, and strategies for improving quality while reducing costs.

results.long_description: Two inspiring days of learning, collaboration, and community. For the first time, the conference will be held at the Oracle Innovations Campus in Kansas City.

results.name: NAMD Fall 2026 Conference
results.short_description: Premier event for Medicaid directors and senior agency staff from across the country.
results.long_description: The NAMD Fall Conference convenes state Medicaid directors and their teams to address pressing issues in Medicaid policy and administration. Sessions cover topics including managed care, behavioral health integration, social determinants of health, and federal-state partnerships. This event provides a critical forum for sharing best practices and shaping the future of Medicaid.

results.name: The 27th Risk Adjustment Forum

results.long_description: The 27th Risk Adjustment Forum is the premier event for risk adjustment and quality specialists of all levels to achieve educational goals and improve efficiency through accredited sessions. The conference addresses the most pressing issues facing the health benefits industry, health care affordability, and access.

results.name: The 16th Annual HEDIS & Quality Improvement Summit
results.short_description: Immersive summit for health plans to gain strategies for quality improvement, digital measures transition, and health equity.
results.long_description: Attend this immersive one-stop shop opportunity for health plans to gain tactical and actionable strategies to take your organization's improvement initiatives to the next level and boost your ratings. Leave armed with key insights to improve quality ratings by understanding the evolving health plan annual quality measure reporting landscape, preparing for new measures and the transition to digital measures, improving the member experience, and pursuing health equity.

results.short_description: Healthcare's #1 innovation event covering AI, care delivery, health policy, investment strategy, and more. The largest convening of healthcare leaders.

Focus areas include AI & Emerging Technology, Investors & Startups, Diagnostics, Employer & Workforce Health, Food Lab, International, Nurses/Physicians/Clinicians, Oral Health, Patient Voice & Impact, Pharma & Life Sciences, Substance Use, and Women's Health. results.short_description: State-focused health policy conference bringing together policymakers, health plans, providers, and industry leaders to discuss regional healthcare reform.
results.long_description: The Illinois State of Reform Health Policy Conference convenes practitioners, thought leaders, and policymakers to improve the healthcare system. The 2026 edition features Opening Plenary on the evolving federal landscape with Verlon Johnson (Chair, MACPAC) and Lizzy Whitehorn (Director, IL DHFS), and Closing Keynote by Rep. Bob Morgan (Assistant Majority Leader).
